site.name: Bay Area BMR
hero.title: Find your next home
hero.title2: at a price you can afford.
hero.subtitle: Every Below Market Rate housing listing across 8 Bay Area cities — in one place. Photos, amenities, deadlines, and application links.
hero.search: Search by property name, address, or city...
listing.noResultsTip: Try broadening your search or selecting different filters.
value.title: Why Bay Area BMR?
value.subtitle: We built the housing search that should already exist.
value.one.title: 8 Cities, One Search
value.one.desc: Stop checking 8 different city websites. Every BMR listing from San Jose to Palo Alto, in one place.
value.two.title: See What You're Getting
value.two.desc: Interior photos, amenities, and market-rate comparisons. BMR units are in luxury buildings — we show you that.
value.three.title: Never Miss a Deadline
value.three.desc: Application windows are short. We track every deadline and will notify you when new listings open in your city.
tips.title: How to Apply for BMR Housing
tips.subtitle: A step-by-step guide to navigating the application process across Bay Area cities.
ami.title: AMI Calculator
ami.subtitle: Find out which BMR listings you qualify for based on your household income and size.
about.title: About Bay Area BMR
about.subtitle: Free, open-source affordable housing data for the Bay Area. Built with public records, maintained for the public good.
footer.mission: Free, open-source affordable housing data for the Bay Area. Built with public records. Not affiliated with any government agency.
footer.copyright: Bay Area BMR. Open source under MIT License.
footer.cpra: Data sourced via California Public Records Act (CPRA) requests.
map.title: Map View
